plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-471 RP15.P07.M03.S21-RP15.P07.M05.S16 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-471 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP15.P07 workflow permission slice: the M03 Primary Implementation Slice tail (the two remaining rows), the full M04 Secondary Workflow Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M05 Permission And Audit Binding head (the first sixteen rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H15), Claude review packet (C15), and CP00-472 handoff, without opening analytics, Matter P&L, forecast, or WIP runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-471 is a descriptor-only closeout pack (19th in the RP15 "Firm Analytics" series) covering the RP15.P07 workflow permission slice: M03 tail (2 rows) + M04 full cycle (22 rows) + M05 head (16 rows) = 40 units, range RP15.P07.M03.S21-RP15.P07.M05.S16, risk class B. Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim set is supported and honestly scoped, with no P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.

Identity and distribution are consistent across pack binding (registry.js:307-322), contract current_pack (contracts/analytics-core-contract.json:16-31), live plan (docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:409-428), manifest (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-471/manifest.json), and review baseline: pack_id CP00-471, unit_count 40, deliverable_counts {claude_review:2, implementation:4, failure_recovery:24, security_audit:3, hermes_evidence:3, fixture:2, test:2} (sum 40, matches included-units deliverable_type tally), micro_title_row_counts {Primary Implementation Slice:2, Secondary Workflow Slice:22, Permission And Audit Binding:16}.

Implementation (service.js:2294-2413) mirrors the established CP470 pattern exactly with frozen descriptor objects, descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, and a full no-write/no-runtime guard set. Validators (validators.js:3273-3440) provide thorough coverage, descriptor, authority-boundary, and handoff checks. Tests (model.test.js:1247-1297) include three meaningful CP471 blocks plus deepEqual contract-to-registry projection assertions. No writeFile/network/exec calls exist in any changed source file or the validation script (read-only readFile + assert only). Cross-pack acceptance is maintained: CP471 was added to every prior pack validator's current_pack acceptance list (CP453-CP470), so advancing the contract to CP00-471 does not regress earlier validators.

Boundaries hold: production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review/implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout (no over-claim), no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (claude_is_final_approval:false, allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob, read_only:true) and not final approver. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor review-packet/receipt handling (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false; receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write), not product runtime. Enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation.

CP178+ review hardening verified: auth preflight passed (exit 0, stdout 1432 bytes, valid JSON), invalid_review_blockers list is complete (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, disabled_tools_run, missing_raw_output_reference, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_enterprise_trust_claim), no invalid attempts recorded for this pack, prompt is 2276 bytes (<25600) with no embedded full diff/source and no forbidden tools. Changed-file scope correctly identifies the 7 modified files plus the new cp00-471/ manifest dir as pack-related and excludes unrelated dirty files (workbook docs, the LDIP invalid-attempt JSON) with nothing required omitted.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-471 analytics core p07 workflow permission slice descriptor pack
